name: SOLAR FLARE
desc: Warm retrofuturist control room. Amber instrumentation on obsidian surfaces. The feeling of piloting something expensive through the dark.

name: DEEP CURRENT
desc: Abyssal oceanic with bioluminescent punctuation. Submarine instrument deck. Data surfaces that glow like deep-sea organisms.

name: PHOSPHOR BURN
desc: CRT monitor afterglow. Green phosphor on warm black. The nostalgic hum of cathode-ray tubes running hot in a dark room.

name: TERRACOTTA GRID
desc: Sun-baked clay meets digital precision. Warm paper backgrounds with burnt earth accents. Mediterranean workshop with Japanese spatial discipline.

name: SIGNAL NOIR
desc: Pure high-contrast editorial. Near-black and near-white with a single violent accent. The feeling of flipping through a Monocle issue in a blackout.

name: KANJI ELECTRIC
desc: Tokyo signage at 2AM. Saturated neon on blue-black. Dense, alive, slightly overwhelming, completely magnetic. Every surface hums.

name: CONCRETE BLOOM
desc: Brutalist concrete surfaces with wildflower colour eruptions. Cold grey architecture invaded by impossible pigments. Beauty forcing its way through structure.

name: VELVET TERMINAL
desc: Deep aubergine-black with rose gold and electric violet. A luxury instrument wrapped in dark fabric. Soft where it should be, sharp where it counts.

name: TEKKI SHOCK
desc: Retrofuturist maximum. Indigo-black base with screaming chartreuse and hot pink. Grid lines visible. The future as imagined by 1984.

name: BURNT CIRCUIT
desc: Scorched copper on carbon. The smell of hot solder. Warm metallics against smoky charcoal. Industrial, physical, honest.

name: ARCTIC PULSE
desc: Ice-blue surfaces with hot coral punctuation. Nordic winter meets emergency signage. Clean, cold, precise, then suddenly: heat.

name: CHROMATIC FORGE
desc: The definitive Clawmachine system. Near-black with warm-grey undertone. Red-orange primary, teal secondary. Every page owns its colour without breaking the family.

name: NEON GENESIS
desc: Pure neon primaries on void black. Every colour at maximum saturation. Arcade cabinet energy.

name: ULTRAVIOLET HAZE
desc: Deep purple void with UV-reactive accents. The feeling of a blacklight room in a science lab.

name: ELECTRIC BUBBLEGUM
desc: Hot pink primary with cyan complement on ink-black. Pop art meets control panel. Unapologetically loud.

name: TOXIC LIME
desc: Radioactive chartreuse on obsidian. Hazmat chic. Warning labels as design language.

name: SUNSET BOULEVARD
desc: Warm gradient spectrum from coral through amber to gold. Hollywood golden hour captured in UI.

name: PLASMA FIELD
desc: Electric magenta and cyan plasma on deep indigo. Particle accelerator aesthetic. Science fiction made real.

name: VIVA VEGAS
desc: Casino signage on midnight blue. Gold, red, and cyan competing for attention. Excess as identity.

name: ROLLER DISCO
desc: 70s roller rink neon on dark teal. Purple, gold, and lavender. Retro party gone digital.

name: HONG KONG NEON
desc: Dense Asian city night. Crimson, coral, lime, and cyan layered on dark burgundy. Every sign competing.

name: STATION PLATFORM
desc: Train station neon against steel blue. Hot pink glow reflecting off wet platforms. Atmospheric density.

name: HEY MR DJ
desc: Nightclub blacklight UV. Deep space purple, electric magenta, acid green. Bass-heavy visual rhythm.

name: FESTIVAL CHAOS
desc: Music festival poster at full volume. Electric purple, blazing yellow, hot pink. Ordered chaos.

name: MIDNIGHT DREAM
desc: Rich midnight indigo with neon aqua and soft lavender. Sleek, elevated, futuristic calm.

name: NEON CITRUS
desc: Electrified tropical. Neon green through electric yellow. Zesty, alive, almost too bright.

name: ELECTRIC DREAMS
desc: Piktochart Electric Dreams made real. Red-orange through sky blue. Energetic futurism.

name: NEON JUNGLE
desc: Bioluminescent rainforest. Deep forest black with screaming green and violet flowers.

name: RETRO FUTURE
desc: Warm cream paper with bold orange and chocolate. Retro-future as imagined by a 1970s architect.

name: COSMIC VIOLET
desc: Deep space purple with dreamy neon violet and soft yellow glow. Ethereal and surreal.

name: CANDY NEON
desc: Sugar-coated neon. Hot magenta, lime, electric yellow, cyan. Toybox meets control panel.

name: WARM TERMINAL
desc: Amber-on-dark terminal with modern proportions. The golden age of computing, reimagined.

name: SAKURA CIRCUIT
desc: Cherry blossom pink on midnight. Delicate and powerful simultaneously. Japanese electronics poetry.

name: HAZARD STRIPE
desc: Industrial warning system. Yellow-black hazard markings as design language. Serious machinery.

name: COBALT RUSH
desc: Deep cobalt blue base with electric coral and gold. Premium instrument energy.

name: FIRECRACKER
desc: Explosive red-orange on charcoal. Chinese New Year energy. Celebration encoded in color.

name: SYNTH WAVE
desc: 80s synthesizer aesthetic. Purple-blue base, hot pink horizon line, cyan grid. Outrun soundtrack visualized.

name: ALPINE GLOW
desc: Mountain snow meets sunset alpenglow. Clean white surfaces with warm pink-orange horizon accents.

name: DEEP OCEAN
desc: Mariana Trench darkness with bioluminescent organisms. Near-black blue with ethereal glow.

name: DESERT STORM
desc: Sand and dust with electric oasis blue. Mojave meets mission control. Hot, dry, precise.

name: VOLT YELLOW
desc: Pure electric yellow on near-black. High-voltage warning. Every surface charged.

name: MAGENTA MATRIX
desc: Deep magenta-black with fuchsia data streams. The Matrix if it were pink instead of green.

name: NEON PARADISE
desc: Red spectrum paradise. Multiple reds from crimson to magenta, layered on black coral.

name: SPECTRUM SHIFT
desc: Full chromatic wheel mapped to page identities. Rainbow discipline. Every page its own wavelength.

name: FAEB GOLD
desc: Deep aubergine-purple with gold leaf and magenta neon. Royal night market.

name: CORAL REEF
desc: Warm ocean depths. Coral orange, seafoam, deep navy. Underwater instrument panel.

name: SUPERNOVA
desc: Stellar explosion. White-hot center radiating through yellow, orange, red to deep space black.

name: GOTHIC BLOOM
desc: Victorian dark botanical. Near-black green with poisonous flower accents. Dark garden intelligence.

name: STREET MACHINE
desc: Modified car culture. Matte black with electric underglow. Tuner instrument cluster.

name: BLOOD MOON
desc: Lunar eclipse. Deep crimson-black with pale moonlight and blood-red phenomena.

name: AURORA BOREALIS
desc: Northern lights on arctic black. Shifting greens, violets, and cyan. Atmospheric magic.

name: RUST OXIDE
desc: Oxidized iron aesthetics. Deep brown-black with rust orange and verdigris green. Post-industrial beauty.

name: NEON MINT
desc: Fresh mint neon on charcoal. Cool, clean, slightly clinical. Operating theatre meets arcade.

name: CRIMSON ENGINE
desc: Deep crimson-black machine room. The heartbeat of heavy industry. Red-hot iron.

name: VAPOR TRAIL
desc: Vaporwave distilled. Pastel neon on dark purple. Nostalgic digital fever dream.

name: INFRARED
desc: Thermal imaging aesthetic. Deep black with heat-map reds, oranges, and yellows. See the invisible.

name: JADE EMPEROR
desc: Imperial jade green on lacquer black. Gold accents. Chinese imperial aesthetic digitized.

name: NEON ORCHID
desc: Exotic orchid purple with electric pink and deep forest. Tropical nightclub in a control room.

name: CARBON FIBER
desc: Woven carbon texture on pure matte black. Single accent colour pops like a supercar detail.

name: PACIFIC SUNSET
desc: Warm Pacific coast sunset. Peach, coral, turquoise, and sand. Coastal instrument panel.

name: PHOSPHOR AMBER
desc: Amber phosphor CRT display. Orange monochrome terminal. Warm glow of old banking systems.

name: ELECTRIC VIOLET
desc: Pure violet electricity on neutral dark. The colour of static discharge. Dangerous beauty.
